steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is “tempting but inaccurate”, which shows the author is evaluating and rejecting an interpretation of how fast painting influenced the Highwaymen aesthetic.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice C matches this logic by describing the underlined portion as rebutting an interpretation of the technique’s impact. The other three options misrepresent the function: A fabricates a disagreement, B reverses the direction of influence, and D introduces a central/peripheral contrast not present.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
